obligations.rule: Default behavior: validate a standard FQDN with require_tld=true, allow_underscores=false, allow_trailing_dot=false, allow_numeric_tld=false, allow_wildcard=false, ignore_max_length=false.
obligations.why: Baseline behavior must validate standard FQDNs and reject invalid ones.

obligations.rule: Option require_tld=false: allow domains without a TLD.
obligations.why: The option explicitly disables the TLD requirement.

obligations.rule: Option allow_underscores=true: allow underscores in domain labels.
obligations.why: The option explicitly permits underscores in domain names.

obligations.rule: Option allow_trailing_dot=true: allow domains ending with a trailing dot.
obligations.why: The option explicitly permits trailing dots.
The option explicitly permits numeric TLDs.

obligations.rule: Option allow_wildcard=true: allow domains starting with a wildcard (*.).
obligations.why: The option explicitly permits wildcard domains.

obligations.rule: Option ignore_max_length=true: allow domains exceeding the standard max length.
obligations.why: The option explicitly disables the max length check.

obligations.rule: Reject invalid characters in domain names.
obligations.why: Domain names must conform to valid character rules.

obligations.rule: Reject domains with labels exceeding 63 characters.
obligations.why: Each label in a domain must not exceed 63 characters.

obligations.rule: Reject domains exceeding 255 characters in total length (default behavior).
obligations.why: The default behavior enforces the max length constraint.

test_groups.title: Default behavior tests
test_groups.rationale: Covers baseline behavior with default options.

test_groups.title: require_tld=false tests
test_groups.rationale: Tests domains without TLD when require_tld is disabled.

test_groups.title: allow_underscores=true tests
test_groups.rationale: Tests domains with underscores when allow_underscores is enabled.

test_groups.title: allow_trailing_dot=true tests
test_groups.rationale: Tests domains with trailing dots when allow_trailing_dot is enabled.

test_groups.title: allow_numeric_tld=true tests
test_groups.rationale: Tests domains with numeric TLDs when allow_numeric_tld is enabled.

test_groups.title: allow_wildcard=true tests
test_groups.rationale: Tests wildcard domains when allow_wildcard is enabled.

test_groups.title: ignore_max_length=true tests
test_groups.rationale: Tests domains exceeding max length when ignore_max_length is enabled.
